/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/trash_item__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/trash_count__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/robot_status__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vacuum_msgs/msg/detail/game_state__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vacuum_msgs/srv/detail/collect_trash__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vacuum_msgs/srv/detail/unload_trash__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/vacuum_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/vacuum_msgs/srv/detail/reset_game__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/adam/opk/zadanie2/build/vacuum_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libvacuum_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
